description: Apple Inc designs, manufactures, and markets consumer electronics, software, and services. Known for iPhone, Mac, iPad, and a growing services business.
known_facts: iPhone is Apple's largest revenue segment
Apple has over $90 billion in annual services revenue
Apple has a market capitalization exceeding $3 trillion
Apple has significant cash reserves and share buyback program
Apple Silicon M-series chips power Mac computers
Apple operates the App Store, Apple Music, iCloud, and Apple TV+
Apple has over 1 billion active iPhone users worldwide
known_risks: Antitrust investigations by EU and US Department of Justice regarding App Store
Heavy dependence on iPhone revenue concentration
Supply chain concentration in China and geopolitical risk
Slowing iPhone upgrade cycle and market saturation
Regulatory pressure on App Store commission rates
known_strengths: Unmatched brand loyalty and premium pricing power
Vertically integrated hardware and software ecosystem
Services segment growing faster than hardware
Leading chip design capability with Apple Silicon
